hypotheses.hypothesis: GET /api/users/123 may expose another users record when object identifiers are changed. Prior related context: GET::/api/users/123
hypotheses.name: idor_identifier_replay
hypotheses.resource_understanding: The endpoint appears to operate on the 'users' resource.
test_cases: Send a baseline request to the configured object identifier.
Replay the request with nearby identifier values and compare authorization behavior.
Check whether the mutated response returns another object's data with a similar schema.

hypotheses.hypothesis: GET /api/users/123 may allow access to high-value or sparse users identifiers without ownership checks. Prior related context: GET::/api/users/123

mutations.description: Replace path identifier with a distant high value.
mutations.name: path_high_value_999999

hypotheses.name: idor_sparse_identifier_enumeration
hypotheses.resource_understanding: The final path segments suggest a direct object lookup for 'users'.
test_cases: Try a distant identifier such as 999999 and compare status code and response body size.
Treat unchanged denial responses as not confirmed rather than positive findings.
